title: Built by Jedi - The Making of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
original_title: Built by Jedi - The Making of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
overview: Follow the teams at Respawn, Lucasfilm and EA as they strive to translate the cinematic magic of Star Wars into the awe-inspiring gameplay of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order.
